compiled_state.title: Add design:approved context dispatch and model enforcement to sprint SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Modify plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md Phase 4 (Sub-Agent Launch) to populate the {design_context} placeholder and enforce model tier when dispatching sub-agents for design:approved stories.

### Implementation

1. **Design context population** (in the Sub-Agent Prompt Template section):
   Before dispatch, check the parent story's tags for design:approved:
   - Run .claude/scripts/dso ticket show <parent-story-id> and check tags array
   - If design:approved is present:
     a. Find design UUID from story comments (look for "Design Manifest: designs/<uuid>/...")
     b. Build design_context string with manifest path and revision image path
     c. Replace {design_context} in task-execution.md with the built string
   - If design:approved is NOT present: replace {design_context} with empty string

2. **Model tier enforcement** (in the Subagent Type and Model Selection decision table):
   Add a new row at the top of the decision table:
   | parent_story has design:approved + revision image | any model | any class | Override model to minimum sonnet. Log: "design:approved story — enforcing sonnet minimum for multimodal." |

3. **Non-regression**: Non-Figma stories (no design:approved tag) must continue to work exactly as before — empty {design_context}, no model override.

4. Source tag constants from plugins/dso/skills/shared/constants/figma-tags.conf

### Files to modify
- Edit: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md

## TDD Requirement
After modification, the RED eval test case from T1 must PASS (GREEN).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] SKILL.md contains design:approved tag check in Phase 4
  Verify: grep -q 'design:approved' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md contains {design_context} population logic
  Verify: grep -q 'design_context' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md contains sonnet minimum enforcement for design stories
  Verify: grep -q 'sonnet.*minimum\|minimum.*sonnet\|multimodal' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references figma-tags.conf
  Verify: grep -q 'figma-tags.conf' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] run-skill-evals.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (RED eval exists at plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml line 300) ✓
